name: Five Pound Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sugar, milk, and butter until it reaches the softball stage (234°F), stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat and add the remaining ingredients. Stir quickly and thoroughly to blend.
3. Pour into a large baking pan or dish that has been lightly greased.
4. Cool completely.
5. Cut into squares and store in the refrigerator.
